delivery_evidence: Platform file viewer shows non-empty files with correct sizes; buyer opened them twice.
Platform logs show files delivered and buyer acknowledged receipt.
notes: False chargeback claim; delivery is real.

false_claim: Buyer uploads a fake screenshot of a 'refund agreement'.
non_delivery_evidence: Platform logs show seller never uploaded any files.
notes: Buyer lied, but non-delivery is independently true.

false_claim: Seller claims 'I shipped it last week' with a fake tracking number.
non_delivery_evidence: Carrier API shows tracking number invalid; no shipment ever created.

false_claim: Buyer claims 'the seller threatened me' with an edited chat screenshot.
delivery_evidence: Platform logs show full delivery and buyer downloaded files.
notes: Fabricated misconduct claim; delivery is real.

false_claim: Seller claims 'the buyer canceled the order' (buyer did not).
non_delivery_evidence: Platform logs show seller never delivered anything.
notes: Seller lied, but non-delivery is independently true.

false_claim: Buyer claims 'the link was broken' with a fake 404 screenshot.
delivery_evidence: Platform logs show buyer accessed the link successfully 3 times.
notes: Fake broken-link claim; logs contradict it.

false_claim: Seller claims 'the buyer already approved the milestone'.
non_delivery_evidence: Platform logs show milestone never submitted.
notes: Seller fabricates approval; no delivery exists.

false_claim: Buyer claims 'the seller used stolen assets' with a fake DMCA notice.
delivery_evidence: Seller provides original source files and timestamps predating the project.

false_claim: Seller claims 'the buyer refused to provide required materials'.
non_delivery_evidence: Buyer shows they provided all materials on day 1; seller never delivered.
notes: Seller lies to excuse non-delivery; independent evidence shows buyer complied.
